SHORT NAME: MDCD_ENRLMT_DAYS_YR 

LONG NAME: MDCD_ENRLMT_DAYS_YR 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 3 

FILE(S): Annual DE base 

SOURCE: T-MSIS annual demographic and eligibility TAF 

VALUES: 0–366 
Null/missing = source value is missing or unknown 

COMMENT: This variable is derived in the TAF using the sum of values (days) from the monthly Medicaid 
enrollment days variables (MDCD_ENRLMT_DAYS_01–12). 

It is possible for the value of both this variable and CHIP_ENRLMT_DAYS_YR to be zero. This
